text: I feel a spark of curiosity in this environment. The conference room behind glass hints at order, collaboration, and the promise of shared ideas. Yet, in the second space, the vibrant display and the words about creativity, repair, and anticipation awaken me to the spirit of innovation. Here, I am both an observer and a participant in the unfolding story of invention. I sense a gentle excitement, as if I am standing at the threshold of discovery, ready to see what human ingenuity will bring next.
